calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-16-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a minor.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/M. Vallejo, CSR: Ron Sinclair.
Petitioner: Todd Ng present for a minor in pro per and with Cantonese Interpreter Charles Zhang, was sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition for change of the MINOR'S name to: Allen Brandon Ng.
Decree signed in open court.
